props.name: actions
props.comment: When false, hides retry/cancel buttons. Default `true`.

props.name: attemptsSource
props.comment: Record field holding the attempt count. Default `"attempts"`.

props.name: errorSource
props.comment: Record field holding the last-error string. Default `"lastError"`.

props.name: payloadSource
props.comment: Record field holding the payload object. Default `"payload"`.

props.name: pollInterval
props.comment: Polling interval in ms. `0` disables polling. Default `5000`.

props.name: statusSource
props.comment: Record field holding the status string. Default `"status"`.

props.name: tabs
props.comment: Status tabs to surface, in order. Default `["running","queued","failed","done"]`.

props.name: typeSource
props.comment: Record field holding the job kind / type. Default `"type"`.
